SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="none" height="24" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M5 12L4.64645 11.6464L4.29289 12L4.64645 12.3536L5 12ZM17 12.5C17.2761 12.5 17.5 12.2761 17.5 1
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

Trust, anger and the limits of EU democracy promotion | NUPI

https://www.nupi.no/mediedeltakelse/podkaster/trust-anger-and-the-limits-of-eu-democracy-promotion
Avvik: 55 | Bestått: 186
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)

Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="none" height="24" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M5 12L4.64645 11.6464L4.29289 12L4.64645 12.3536L5 12ZM17 12.5C17.2761 12.5 17.5 12.2761 17.5 1
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
